theme.label: Theme
theme.help: Choose light, dark, or follow the system appearance. Applied immediately.

language.label: Language
language.help: Switch the interface language, applied immediately.

banner.title: Environment not ready. Please unlock the following first:

dep.micDenied: Microphone access was denied. Allow OmniTranslate in System Settings → Privacy & Security → Microphone.
dep.installGuideHint: After installing from the guide, return here and we will detect BlackHole automatically.

field.locked: Insufficient permission. Unlock the dependencies above first.
field.noVerifiedAsr: Configure and test ASR in Preferences first
field.noVerifiedMt: Configure and test a translation engine in Preferences first

error.captureFailed: Could not start audio capture. Check the input source and system permissions.
error.noAsrOrMt: Complete ASR and translation connection tests in Preferences before listening.

audioConfig.okNote: Environment ready — panel switched to ready state

ocrPermission.heading: Screen Recording Permission Required
ocrPermission.lead: Live Subtitle needs Screen Recording permission to capture the screen region you select for OCR.
ocrPermission.privacy: We never upload any of your screen data

guide.caption: Guide: System Settings → Privacy & Security → Screen Recording

ocrOverlay.hint: Press and drag to select a region

subtitle.original: Welcome to the future of AI translation.
subtitle.clickthrough: Click through to the app behind

ocrSettings.title: OCR Service Settings
ocrSettings.sub: For on-screen text recognition. Local engines are free and keep data on-device; cloud providers offer higher accuracy but require keys.

engine.label: OCR Engine
engine.help: Cloud providers require an API key

asrSettings.title: Audio ASR Settings
asrSettings.sub: Speech-to-text engine. Local Whisper is fully offline — larger models are more accurate but slower; cloud providers offer low latency but need a connection.

engine.label: ASR Engine
engine.help: Read from the available list in the audio config panel

model.label: Model Size
model.help: Tiny is fastest · Large is most accurate

manage.label: Model Management
manage.pathPlaceholder: Model file path or placeholder identifier

test.label: Connection Test
test.help: Only appears in the audio panel after a successful test

mtSettings.title: Translation Service Settings
mtSettings.sub: Traditional machine translation has low latency for short text; LLM translation understands context better and supports OpenAI-compatible custom proxies.

llm.promptHint: The preset is editable; {{text}} will be replaced with the recognized source text
llm.promptDefault: You are a professional simultaneous interpreter. Translate the input text accurately and naturally into English. Output only the translation, no explanations.

test.label: Connection Test
test.help: Only appears in the audio panel after a successful test
